name: io.github.truman-t3/keyshot-mcp
title: KeyShot MCP
description: Control KeyShot Studio through local headless scripting with MCP.

environmentVariables.name: KEYSHOT_HEADLESS_EXE
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to KeyShot headless, or a command available on PATH.

environmentVariables.name: KEYSHOT_CAMERA_PRESETS
environmentVariables.description: Optional path to a user-managed camera preset JSON file.
